nameMeanings.name: Monmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Hawise de Monmouth was born in 1069, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with William FitzBaderon. She died in 1148, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hawise de Monmouth est née en 1069, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec William FitzBaderon. Elle est décédée en 1148, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Monmouthは1069年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで生まれた。彼女はWilliam FitzBaderonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1148年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで79歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Monmouth(은)는 1069년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William FitzBaderon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1148년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hawise de Monmouth родилась в 1069 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от William FitzBaderon. Она умерла в 1148 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
